compositional_truth_check.reconciliation_notes: The biome has undergone a catastrophic collapse of biological material. The registry-defined specimens (P1-P4) are no longer present as viable plants.

inventory_reconciliation.P3_Pothos: Systemic Loss (Rabbit anchor remains, plant material absent)

plant_audit.P1: Empty yellow pot; no organic matter detected.
plant_audit.P2: Empty black pot; no organic matter detected.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor present; Pothos foliage has completely vanished.
plant_audit.P4: Empty black pot; no organic matter detected.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Desiccated, dark, and devoid of life.
biome_observations.debris: Persistent presence of crushed eggshells (calcium amendment attempt) across the soil surface of the black pots.

temporal_deltas.t-4_to_t-3: Pothos leaf shows signs of chlorosis and wilting.
temporal_deltas.t-3_to_t-2: Pothos leaf exhibits severe postural collapse.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_t-1: Total disappearance of Pothos leaf; only eggshell debris remains.

visual_health_inference.conclusion: The biome is currently non-functional. All registered plant life has perished or been removed.
visual_health_inference.evidence: Visual absence of chlorophyll-bearing tissue in all pots.

anomalies.intervention: Crushed eggshells observed in soil, likely an attempt at soil enrichment that failed to prevent plant mortality.
anomalies.missing_elements: The rabbit anchor is the only remaining non-soil element.

vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a total loss of the botanical collection. Over the 5-day observation window, the Pothos (P3) underwent rapid senescence, progressing from a healthy state to complete disappearance. The other pots (P1, P2, P4) appear to have been empty or contained non-viable material throughout the sequence. The presence of eggshells suggests a failed attempt at horticultural intervention. The environment is currently a sterile soil-only setup.
